title.en: Checking Your Phone in the Morning

phrases.en: Kate reaches for her phone on the nightstand.
phrases.zh: 凯特伸手去拿床头柜上的手机。

phrases.en: She presses the side button to wake the screen.
phrases.zh: 她按下侧边按钮，唤醒屏幕。

phrases.en: She unlocks the phone with her face.
She quickly glances at the new notifications.
phrases.zh: 她快速扫了一眼新的通知。

phrases.en: She swipes down to open her messages.
phrases.zh: 她向下滑动，打开她的短信。

phrases.en: She reads a short text from a friend.
phrases.zh: 她读了一条朋友发来的简短短信。
她仔细查看今天的天气预报。

phrases.en: It is cold and rainy outside.
She sets the phone down on the bed.
Then, she gets up to get ready for the day.
phrases.zh: 然后，她起身准备开始新的一天。
